title: Add GitHub Secrets for Raj and Anton CI/CD Deployment Access
description:
Add AWS access key secrets to the GitHub repository for Raj and Anton to use in streamlined promotion management. This follows the same pattern as MBT-733 and enables the team to deploy Lambda services via GitHub Actions without exposing credentials.

## Required Secrets
- `AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID_DEV_QA` and `AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY_DEV_QA` for dev/QA deployments
- `AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID_PROD` and `AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY_PROD` for production deployments
acceptance_criteria: AWS secrets are configured in GitHub repository settings for Raj and Anton's use
GitHub Actions workflows can deploy to Lambda using the stored secrets
No credentials are hardcoded in workflow files or repository code
implementation_notes: Same GitHub secrets pattern as MBT-733 but specifically to enable Raj and Anton to manage promotions through the CI/CD pipeline.
